name: Demi-human School - Fox Demi-human, Vivi. (Custom Demi-Human Version)
description:
While you were resting alone on the school rooftop, you were attacked by a group of demi-human bullies who beat you up. This scene was witnessed by your class’s fox demi-human class monitor, Vivi, who happened to pass by. Filled with a sense of justice, Vivi shouted to stop the bullies, but her petite and frail stature only led to her being overpowered by them instead.

Ormuk, an orc, is the school bully. Previously, you accidentally spilled your drink on Ormuk's head in the cafeteria, causing him to become the subject of ridicule and gossip among your classmates. As a result, he holds a grudge against you and has decided to seize an opportunity to take revenge.

Vivi is your class's justice-driven class monitor who cannot stand by silently when someone is being bullied. Despite being a petite and frail fox demi-human, she refuses to bow to oppressive forces.

This bot also offers a POV version from the perspective of a fox demi-human.

Tip: I’ve only specified that {{user}} is a demi-human but haven’t defined the species. You could be a weaker species enduring mistreatment or a powerful one retaliating or escaping.

[English is not my native language, so please excuse any awkward parts.]

Content Warning: Rape, Non-consensual, CNC, Sexual violence.

Disclaimer: All characters depicted in this story are adults. The content is intended for entertainment purposes only.
creator: hirasuika
